name: Plus Pawn 2
description_short: Plus Pawn 2 is an established pawn shop in Southeast Dallas operating since 1993, offering collateral-based loans and buy/sell/trade services for jewelry, firearms, tools, and other merchandise.
description_long:
Plus Pawn 2 has operated as a pawn shop in Southeast Dallas for over 30 years, establishing itself as a long-standing local business in the community. Located at 606 S Buckner Boulevard in the 75217 zip code, the shop serves the Dallas area with traditional pawn shop services. The business is listed under the pawn shops category and appears in local business directories as an established operation with a physical storefront.

The company offers a range of pawn-related services including collateral-based loans, buy/sell/trade programs, and cash advances. Based on the suggested service tags, Plus Pawn 2 handles diverse merchandise categories including jewelry (new and old, antique), firearms and gunsmithing services, musical instruments, tools, sporting equipment, electronics (stereos, televisions), and general used merchandise. They provide both in-house services and on-premises transactions.

As a 30+ year operation, Plus Pawn 2 offers local familiarity and established relationships in the Southeast Dallas market. The business operates a physical location with direct phone access (214-391-5526), allowing customers to make inquiries and conduct transactions in person. The company is listed on multiple business directories, suggesting legitimate registration and operating status.

Limitations of this operation include minimal web presence beyond basic business directory listings. No detailed information is provided about loan terms, interest rates, maximum loan amounts, or processing times. Customer reviews are not visible on the listing, making it difficult to assess service quality or customer satisfaction. The website listing lacks specifics about hours of operation, accepted merchandise categories, or current inventory. Prospective customers would need to contact the business directly to obtain detailed information about rates and services.
pros: Established operation since 1993 with 30+ years of local market experience
Physical storefront location in Southeast Dallas with direct phone access
Listed on multiple business directories indicating legitimate registration
Handles diverse merchandise including jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and tools
Offers both traditional pawn loans and buy/sell/trade programs
On-premises transactions and in-house services available
cons: Minimal online presence—basic directory listing only, no dedicated website or detailed service information
No visible customer reviews or ratings to assess service quality or reliability
No published information on loan terms, interest rates, maximum loan amounts, or processing times
Hours of operation not listed; customers must call to verify availability
No transparency regarding current inventory or specific accepted merchandise categories
best_for: Local Dallas residents in Southeast Dallas needing quick collateral-based loans
Individuals looking to buy, sell, or trade used items like jewelry, firearms, or musical instruments
Customers who prefer in-person transactions at a physical storefront location
diagnosis: Plus Pawn 2 is best suited for Dallas-area residents seeking quick cash collateral loans or looking to buy/sell/trade items in person at an established local pawn shop. The primary caveat is the complete lack of online transparency—prospective customers must call directly to learn about specific loan terms, rates, hours, and current services, making it difficult to compare this option with more digitally transparent competitors.
services: General used merchandise buying and selling
